chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-52 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 07.05.2025 Mr. Shoukat Ali Rahimoon, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Sharif Solangi Assistant A.G Sindh D.C Umerkot (Naveed Larik) and DHO Umerkot (Muhammad Alam Soomro) <>*<> Deputy Commissioner Umerkot is present and files report, stating therein that salary of the petitioner was stopped in the year 2018 by the then Deputy Commissioner by issuing FO-II Form dated 18.07.2018 in the name of District Accounts Officer Umerkot, however, said FO-II Form does not mention any reason. He further submits that in addition to above the termination order dated 31.03.2012 was withdrawn/cancelled by subsequent order dated 05.12.2012, therefore, the petitioner is entitled for payment of his salary. By stating so, he undertakes to release the salary of the petitioner within five days from today. Counsel for the petitioner expressed satisfaction, keeping in view the statement of Deputy Commissioner, and seeks disposal of the petition in said terms. Ordered accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE *Sajjad*
